productDisplayName: Puma Men's Round Neck Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline, contoured panels on the back and sleeves, tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, embroidered cat logo over the right sleeve, Scudera ferrari badge over the left chest, Italian flag colours over the right shoulder and Ferrari brand name on the centre back FittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry at low Warm iron Do not dryclean Wash and iron inside out Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Take sporty dressing to the next level with this Scudera Ferrari t-shirt from puma. The black colour, Italian flag colours and the Ferrari badge on the left chest infuses this tee with power. The cotton fabric wicks away sweat and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
